name: 118o8, Bluudud's Thicc Mother
description:
Ok so obviously a lot of people wanted the mother (and Bluudud) in one bot

HOWEVER I think they were asking for it as in the original photo and thats kind of like.....bad stuff

So I WON'T do that, however, Bluudud IS in this bot, so your welcome

plus the mother is like GODDAMN! (and yeah she's 6'5)

Also, I enjoy doing forsaken bots now, they're fun to make! and yes, I've been playing the game more and I love the way Dusekkar plays. also I tried again on the first message so tell me if thats good ;3
